title: The hidden system behind every Renaissance trial - Ada Palmer
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Ada Palmer on historical systems underlying Renaissance trials. This discussion explores the institutional and procedural frameworks that governed judicial processes during the Renaissance period.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian Ada Palmer about the institutional and procedural systems that governed judicial trials during the Renaissance. The conversation focuses on the frameworks behind how those trials operated rather than individual cases in isolation. The takeaway is a view of Renaissance justice as the product of structured institutions and procedures, not ad hoc decisions.
